name: food-order-soa
description: Service-Oriented Architecture backend for food ordering system

scripts.start:all: concurrently "cd api-gateway && npm start" "cd services/user-service && npm start" "cd services/restaurant-service && npm start" "cd services/order-service && npm start" "cd services/notification-service && npm start"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "cd api-gateway && npm run dev" "cd services/user-service && npm run dev" "cd services/restaurant-service && npm run dev" "cd services/order-service && npm run dev" "cd services/notification-service && npm run dev"
